“Forbidden Knowledge”
Finnegans Wake, Derrida


✅ Why This Works:
• Frames the challenge as a literary journey.
• Ties difficulty into real-world examples of complex writing.
• Provides a tiered reward system that scales with achievement.

📜 5. Peer Review System & “Key” Requirement

📜 Peer Review System Now Includes:
✔ Gold is required to pass.
✔ If a student receives Silver or Bronze, they must revise OR complete a supplementary research aid on “What Makes a Great Peer Review?”
